2606.26458.title: MKG-RAG-Bench: Benchmarking Retrieval in Multimodal Knowledge Graph-Augmented Generation
2606.26458.paper_summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over knowledge graphs has emerged as a promising approach for grounding large language models, yet existing benchmarks largely overlook the challenges of retrieval in multimodal knowledge graph RAG (MKG-RAG). In practice, retrieval is a critical bottleneck: multimodal knowledge is heterogeneous, difficult to align across modalities, and often poorly served by retrievers designed for unstructured corpora. To address this gap, we introduce MKG-RAG-Bench, a cross-domain benchmark explicitly designed to evaluate retrieval in MKG-RAG. MKG-RAG-Bench is constructed from two multimodal knowledge graphs spanning general and medical domains, and includes carefully aligned question-answering datasets that support controlled evaluation of both retrieval and downstream generation. The benchmark is built using an LLM-based curation pipeline that filters low-utility knowledge, generates structurally grounded queries with exact supervision, and systematically covers diverse modality configurations. Through extensive experiments across representative retriever families and modality settings, we show that effective multimodal retrieval remains challenging yet crucial for end-to-end MKG-RAG performance, and that retrieval quality strongly determines generation outcomes. By isolating retrieval as a first-class evaluation target, MKG-RAG-Bench provides a principled foundation for diagnosing current limitations and advancing multimodal knowledge graph RAG systems.
2606.26458.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）在知識圖譜上的應用已成為為大型語言模型提供基礎的有前景方法，然而現有的基準在很大程度上忽視了多模態知識圖譜 RAG（MKG-RAG）中檢索的挑戰。<lb/>在實踐中，檢索是一個關鍵瓶頸：多模態知識是異質的，難以在不同模態之間對齊，且通常不適合為設計用於非結構化語料庫的檢索器所服務。<lb/>為了解決這一問題，我們介紹了 MKG-RAG-Bench，一個明確設計用於評估 MKG-RAG 中檢索的跨領域基準。<lb/>MKG-RAG-Bench 是由兩個涵蓋一般和醫療領域的多模態知識圖譜構建而成，並包括精心對齊的問答數據集，以支持對檢索和下游生成的控制評估。<lb/>該基準是使用基於 LLM 的策展管道構建的，該管道過濾低效用知識，生成具有精確監督的結構化查詢，並系統地涵蓋多樣的模態配置。<lb/>通過在代表性檢索器家族和模態設置中進行廣泛實驗，我們顯示出有效的多模態檢索仍然具有挑戰性，但對於端到端的 MKG-RAG 性能至關重要，且檢索質量強烈影響生成結果。<lb/>通過將檢索孤立為一個一級評估目標，MKG-RAG-Bench 為診斷當前限制和推進多模態知識圖譜 RAG 系統提供了一個原則性的基礎。
2606.26458.author: Xiaochen Wang et.al.
2606.26458.authors: Xiaochen Wang, Bao Hoang, Han Liu, Ting Wang, Fenglong Ma
